result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's a summary of what was added to the v1 implementation:

- **`status`** — reads the index and prints staged filenames or `(none)`
- **`diff`** — parses two commit files, compares file lists by blob hash, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout`** — restores working-directory files from blob objects, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset`** — updates HEAD and clears index without touching working directory
- **`rm`** — removes a filename from the index (errors if not present)
- **`show`** — prints commit metadata plus indented file list
- **`parse_commit_files`** helper — reusable subroutine that parses the `files:` section of a commit file into parallel filename/hash arrays, used by `diff`, `checkout`, and `show`
